title: Install the agent-browser skill from https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-browser
job:
Install the agent-browser skill from https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-browser

Task:
1. Clone the repository: git clone https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-browser.git
2. Examine the contents to understand the structure
3. Compare with existing skills in the repo to see if it's different from browser-tools
4. If it's a valid skill package, integrate it into the skills/ directory
5. Activate the skill by creating a symlink to skills/active/agent-browser
6. Write findings to output/agent-browser-installation.md

The skill should provide browser automation capabilities. Check if it's:
- A complete skill with SKILL.md
- Requires specific setup or credentials
- A direct replacement or addition to existing browser-tools

Create a complete integration if it's ready to use.
